name: DemocraticSenate@maggiehassan.com
subject: 📊 POLL: we're losing ground 📊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd892/2a380d31/116ecbc5/fde894/1457487761/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd892/2a380d31/116ecbc5/fde894/1457487761/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd892/2a380d31/116ecbc5/fde895/1457487761/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTEwXzA5MDlQb2xsQ2hhbmdlTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160910_0909PollChangeNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
We'll cut to the chase: Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte is _ahead_ of Governor Maggie Hassan in the latest poll. In other words, **if the election were held today, Democrats would lose.** If we're going to win back the Senate and secure the future of the Supreme Court, we HAVE to swing the polls in our favor.
**Moving these numbers in our favor is going to take every single person in this community stepping up and giving what they can -- including you.**
**[Our records indicate that you may be able to donate $3. This couldn't be more important, team, so please donate $3-- every single dollar you can -- now so that we can reclaim our lead in the polls to elect Maggie Hassan, take back the Senate, and secure the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd892/2a380d31/116ecbc5/fde895/1457487761/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTEwXzA5MDlQb2xsQ2hhbmdlTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160910_0909PollChangeNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
These poll numbers aren't surprising when you consider that outside groups have spent $40 MILLION and counting to stop Maggie from winning. Corporate special interests like groups tied to Karl Rove and the Koch Brothers are blitzing the airwaves with attack ads so that they can keep their rubber stamp, Kelly Ayotte, in the Senate.
**With everything being thrown at us, we need a surge of grassroots support, and we need it now:**
**[Can you do your part and donate $3 directly to Maggie's campaign so that together we can elect a Senator who will ALWAYS put hard-working families first, not corporate special interests?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd892/2a380d31/116ecbc5/fde895/1457487761/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTEwXzA5MDlQb2xsQ2hhbmdlTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160910_0909PollChangeNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160910_0909PollChangeNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160910_0909PollChangeNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160910_0909PollChangeNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd892/2a380d31/116ecbc5/fde895/1457487761/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTEwXzA5MDlQb2xsQ2hhbmdlTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160910_0909PollChangeNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Ayotte has made it clear that if she's reelected, she'll prioritize reversing _Roe v. Wade_ , continue to support _Citizens United_ , and put Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and the rest of her party before New Hampshire families.
That's why we mean it when we say that moving the polls in Maggie's favor is going to be a make-or-break moment for our campaign. **Please, give everything you can:[http://maggiehassan.com/lead-gone](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd892/2a380d31/116ecbc5/fde895/1457487761/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTEwXzA5MDlQb2xsQ2hhbmdlTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160910_0909PollChangeNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for stepping up.
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd892/2a380d31/116ecbc5/fde895/1457487761/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTEwXzA5MDlQb2xsQ2hhbmdlTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160910_0909PollChangeNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Connolly Keigher, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Who Hillary Clinton really is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
An incredible story | Derek --

Let's be honest: we've all talked to people who wonder why Hillary is really in this race.

If I could show each and every one of those people just one thing, it would probably be **[this brand new video.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

It's about how, over the course of the campaign, she's met and become friends with an incredible woman named Janelle, who recently battled -- and beat -- breast cancer.

I’ve traveled with Hillary every day of this campaign -- I'm there to make sure every event goes off without a hitch -- so I see this kind of thing happen all the time. She listens to people -- she gets to know them and makes a connection. And then, somehow, she finds the time to circle back, to follow up, to show a little love and kindness.

That’s exactly what happened with Janelle, and -- well, you just have to see the video for yourself: [
](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0) The day they met, Hillary spent 30 minutes getting to know this woman and her two daughters. And ever since that chilly October afternoon, the two have stayed in touch -- in fact, Hillary even introduced her to her lifelong best friend, Betsy, who also survived cancer, and they're friends now, too. "Just to keep widening the circle of caring and love," Hillary told me.

I wish the whole world could see Hillary the way I do. That’s why I’m writing to you today, Derek -- because you can help make that possible just by watching and sharing this video of Janelle and Hillary’s friendship. It’s an incredible story about two brilliant, resilient women.

**I hope you love this video as much as I do (and share it far and wide!):** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks so much, Derek,

Connolly

Connolly Keigher
Trip Director
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and join the 2.3 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY0NzQxMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNjM1NjEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Ben Carson
subject: Join Me Today w/ Michael W. Smith, Mike Huckabee, & Allen Jackson
body:
Untitled 1

Untitled 1

Stand, Pray, Give Thanks A Living
Hope Event
View this email in your browser

I can remember exactly where I
was on that fateful day of September 11, 2001. The events of that
day impacted my life and the lives of all Americans in ways we
could have never expected. As I reflect back on that day and the
fifteen years that have passed since, my heart is filled with
gratitude for all of the amazing first responders and volunteers
that not only came to the rescue that day, but have continued to
do so every day since.
I am honored to be a part of the
Give Thanks event this Sunday on 9/11 along with Pastor Allen
Jackson, Michael W. Smith, Mike Huckabee, Eric Metaxas, Rend
Collective, and others. My Faith Votes is offering you a FREE and
exclusive LIVE behind the scenes perspective of the event via
Facebook Live.

Join me and thousands of others
in an amazing evening of music, hope and thankfulness to God for
His blessings on this great nation.

My Faith Votes
presents
Live Streaming of: GIVE THANKS A
LIVING HOPE EVENT
Live High Quality Video Streaming
at MyFaithVotes.org/givethanks
Facebook Live at
Facebook.com/MyFaithVotes
Date: SEPT 11TH
Time: 7PM (ET) / 4PM (PT)
Add to Your Calendar

Copyright © 2016 MyFaithVotes,
All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.bencarson.com/p/isO7VSobXN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.bencarson.com/p/osO7VSobXN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Bill Bryant
subject: Never Forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant
body:
[Update Profile / Unsubscribe](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/private/igrfw8d7se/2I6/FP87cHS/unsubscribe/27449863)

---
| | Friend
---
Fifteen years ago, I was was in Washington DC on business. My day started like many other days, but later that morning 2,977 people lost their lives in the worst terror attack in our nation’s history. Today, we come together to remember those we lost that day and the bravery and heroism of our first responders. Let us also remember the unity we shared in the days following the attack, and today and in the future strive to reignite that unity. I join all Washingtonians on this day of remembrance, praying for the families of all who have lost loved ones to terrorism, and thankful to those who protect us, whether at home, or abroad. God Bless,
**Bill Bryant**
| | | | | | | [](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27449863/185/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FBillBryantWA)
---
| | [](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27449863/187/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbillbryantwashington)
---
